summary.shape_sentence: Open selloff into a sharp mid-morning rebound, then a lower-high rotational fade that closed back near lower-session support.

goat.note: Opening flush into the session low near 24,140 defined the lower boundary and produced the strongest reversal response.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered on failed bounces and lower-high turns, especially after the morning rebound topped.

green_circles.behavior: Most effective at deep support and retest zones, especially near 24,140-24,200 and the early-afternoon stabilization area.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 24,330-24,380 and 24,430-24,460 was mostly respected during RTH; rallies repeatedly stalled there.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 24,140-24,200 held the key lows; some mid-level demand around 24,230-24,260 was broken during the noon fade.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening weakness was already underway and soon extended into the day low.
time_markers.12pm_red: Morning rebound had failed; price was rolling lower from midday resistance.
time_markers.2pm_green: Price was retesting lower demand and attempting to base.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: RTH ended near 24,210 in the lower half after a weak late rebound attempt.

takeaway: Bearish rotational day with an opening flush, sharp reversal, and repeated lower-high failures under layered supply.
